meta.title: Manar Zmerli – Data Analyst Portfolio
meta.description: Manar Zmerli is a data analyst based in Tunisia, specialized in data analysis, visualization, and business intelligence.
meta.keywords: data analyst, Tunisia, Power BI, Python, SQL, data visualization, business intelligence, Manar Zmerli
meta.whatsapp: Hello! I would like to discuss my data analysis needs with you.

hero.title: Manar Zmerli – Turning Data into Decisions
hero.subtitle: Data Analysis | BI | Python | SQL | Power BI
hero.description: I help companies understand their data and make better decisions through clear and actionable analysis.

services.sectionDescription: Complete data analysis solutions to transform your data into actionable insights.

DataCleaning.title: Data Cleaning
DataCleaning.description: Cleaning, structuring, and preparing datasets to ensure quality and usability.
DataCleaning.metaDescription: Data cleaning and preparation services for reliable analytics.

ExploratoryDataAnalysis.title: Exploratory Data Analysis
ExploratoryDataAnalysis.description: Exploring datasets to identify trends, patterns, and anomalies.
ExploratoryDataAnalysis.metaDescription: In-depth exploratory analysis to better understand your data.

DataVisualization.title: Data Visualization
DataVisualization.description: Creation of interactive dashboards and visual reports using Power BI and Tableau.
DataVisualization.metaDescription: Interactive dashboards and data visualization services.

StatisticalModeling.title: Statistical Modeling
StatisticalModeling.description: Building statistical models to analyze and predict business behavior.
StatisticalModeling.metaDescription: Statistical and predictive data modeling solutions.

BusinessIntelligence.title: Business Intelligence
BusinessIntelligence.description: Designing BI solutions to monitor performance and support decision-making.
BusinessIntelligence.metaDescription: Business Intelligence solutions for performance monitoring.

AutomatedReporting.title: Automated Reporting
AutomatedReporting.description: Automation of reports to provide fast and efficient KPI monitoring.
AutomatedReporting.metaDescription: Automated reporting and KPI tracking dashboards.

DataInsightsConsulting.title: Data Insights Consulting
DataInsightsConsulting.description: Supporting companies in transforming data into strategic decisions.

about.tile1Title: Data Analyst passionate about transforming data into actionable insights.
about.tile1Description: Based in Tunisia, specialized in BI and data analytics
about.tile2Title: Experience in data analysis, visualization, and modeling.
about.tileVisionDescription: Making data accessible and useful for every organization.
about.tileGovernanceDescription: Structured approach focused on data and measurable results
about.tileDiversificationDescription: Python, SQL, Power BI, Tableau, Excel
about.tileSinceDescription: A continuous passion for analytics and data exploration

items.sales_dashboard_description: Interactive business dashboard analyzing sales KPIs, revenue trends, and performance indicators using Power BI, SQL, and Excel.
items.customer_segmentation_description: Customer behavior clustering and segmentation using Python, Pandas, NumPy, and statistical analysis techniques.
items.financial_analysis_description: Financial performance evaluation, profitability analysis, and reporting dashboards built with Excel, Tableau, and SQL databases.
items.marketing_analytics_description: Marketing campaign performance analysis and visualization using Python, Matplotlib, Seaborn, and Jupyter Notebook.
items.hr_analytics_description: Employee data analysis including retention, performance tracking, and workforce insights powered by PostgreSQL and Power BI.
items.predictive_modeling_description: Machine learning models and statistical forecasting using Python, R, SPSS, SAS, and Apache Spark.
items.data_engineering_description: Design of automated ETL pipelines and data warehouse architecture using Apache Airflow, dbt, Docker, and AWS.
items.database_management_description: Database design, optimization, and version-controlled data workflows using MySQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Git, and GitHub.

items.t1Quote: Manar has an exceptional ability to turn complex datasets into clear, actionable insights that directly impacted our decision-making process.
items.t2Quote: Her attention to detail and analytical rigor are outstanding. The reports and dashboards she delivered were both accurate and easy to understand.
items.t3Quote: Working with Manar significantly improved our performance tracking. Her dashboards gave us full visibility over our KPIs and growth opportunities.
items.t4Quote: Manar's analytical work helped us identify key growth opportunities we were previously missing in our data.
items.t5Quote: Her ability to structure messy datasets and deliver clear dashboards made a real difference in our reporting process.
items.t6Quote: The dashboards Manar created for our marketing team saved us hours of manual work each week. Highly recommended!
items.t7Quote: Manar's insights helped us reduce operational costs by 15%. Her analytical approach is methodical and results-driven.
items.t8Quote: One of the best data analysts I've worked with. She understands business needs and delivers exactly what's required.
items.t9Quote: Manar transformed our raw data into a beautiful dashboard that our entire team uses daily. Game changer!
items.t10Quote: Her expertise in SQL and Power BI helped us uncover patterns we never knew existed. Exceptional work.
